title: Touch
meta: For modular synth and Twitter users · People's Bureau 2020

content.value: Online artistic residency during the Covid pandemic. Sound events triggered by real-time tweets containing "touch, free, fear" — creating ambiguous and sometimes opposed meaning.

_comment_paper: To link a research paper, replace null with: {"title": "Paper Title", "url": "papers/filename.pdf"}
